positive: A highly detailed, stylized illustration of a whimsical woodland scene featuring a central forest spirit silhouette interacting with luminous, bioluminescent mushrooms and delicate fairy lights. The composition should be clean and centralized, dominated by deep emerald greens, sapphire blues, and pops of ethereal gold and violet. Style should be modern minimalist illustrative art with strong graphic contrast, suitable for screen printing on fabric. The forest spirit should have graceful, flowing lines. Focus on clean silhouettes, symmetry, and high contrast between the luminous elements and the deep background shadows. Perfect composition for apparel placement.
negative: blur, artifact, text, watermark, noise, low detail, bad anatomy, extra limbs, ugly, cluttered, low contrast, photographic, realistic
